methodology: OWASP Top 10 + STRIDE + Attack Surface Mapping

recommendations.description: Auth cookies missing Secure flag in setAuthCookies(). 60-second TTL mitigates risk but Secure flag should be added for defense in depth.
VITE_OPENROUTER_API_KEY in .env uses VITE_ prefix which would embed the key in client bundle if referenced. Should use server-side proxy pattern instead.

positive_findings: DOMPurify with strict allowlist for markdown rendering (no XSS)
Presigned URL pattern for file uploads (no direct server upload)
Auth bootstrap properly clears stale tokens
No raw SQL or command injection vectors (frontend-only)
